new_classes.label_en: Semi-Sparkling Wine of Fresh Grapes in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2204 22 10)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein aus frischen Weintrauben in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger (KN 2204 22 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes, other than sparkling wine (subheading 2204 10), presented either in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar measured at 20 °C, and packaged in containers of not more than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 22 10 are captured: (1) wine of fresh grapes other than sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10; (2) presented either in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties/fastenings OR with excess CO₂ pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C; (3) in containers ≤ 2 litres (SmallContainer). The excess pressure range [1, 3) bar is modelled via decimalRange restrictions on the existing excessPressureBar property and the existing ExcessPressureQuality class. The mushroom stopper presentation is captured via the existing MushroomStopperBottleQuality. The small container constraint is modelled via BFO has_part some SmallContainer. A slight gap remains in that the disjunction between the two presentations (mushroom stopper OR excess pressure) cannot be fully expressed as a crisp OWL intersection without a union axiom; the restrictions are expressed conjunctively as necessary conditions rather than as a strict equivalence using disjunction. Additionally, the "temperature of 20 °C" measurement condition for the pressure is not modelled (no temperature property exists in the TBox). Coverage is therefore reduced slightly to 0.85.
